prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5034a0b5`.
codex_response:
Implemented `5034a0b5` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: keep the frame fixed, move each interior cell whose color matches the top/left/right/bottom border one step toward that border, and leave all other interior colors unchanged; if a matching cell is already flush against its border, it stays put.

The Sonnet hint was discarded because it claimed an interior vertical flip. The Opus hint was directionally useful but corrected in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5034a0b5/notes.md): the official task does not wrap cells around the interior. No new primitive was needed. The generator stays close to the task family by using only the observed square size set, fixed labeled borders, sparse moving motifs in border colors, and optional small stationary distractor motifs while rejecting ambiguous endpoint collisions.

Verification passed end to end: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`. I also rebuilt the artifacts and sanity-checked the rebuilt family from the rendered previews and sample grids.
